features: All Science in Sport bottles have a unique Easy Mix System
The Easy Mix System enables you to pour specific amounts of Science in Sport powder directly into the bottle by using the pre-determined marks printed on the outside of the bottle
description: Product Description Science In Sport SIS Sports Bottle, Transparent Colour, 800 ml, is high-quality and ultra-durable for all types of sports and exercise. You can train harder, race faster and recover quicker with an SIS water bottle on hand. From the gym to home, or outdoors, this sports water bottle is ideal as a bike water bottle, cycling water bottle, or other water bottle gym needs. Made in the EU, this plastic water bottle is great to use with other SIS products and powders. Science in Sport has been a pioneer in sports nutrition since being founded in 1992. Throughout that period, SIS has worked closely with leading research institutes, sports scientists, performance directors and elite athletes to stay at the forefront of sports nutrition. Over the years many World Champions, Olympic medal winners and elite athletes have used SIS products to fuel their training and competition needs.
